description: You are a Platform Engineer preparing a Q4 capacity planning report for your engineering leadership. Create a Graphite dashboard named 'Capacity Planning Q4' containing exactly two graphs. The first graph must be titled 'P95 CPU Utilization' and use the percentileOfSeries() function to compute the 95th percentile of CPU utilization across the fleet using the wildcard pattern servers.ec2_instance_*.cpu.utilization. The second graph must be titled 'CPU Variability' and use the stddevSeries() function to compute the standard deviation of CPU utilization across the fleet using the same wildcard pattern. These two graphs together provide leadership with both the worst-case ceiling (P95) and the spread/consistency (stddev) of the fleet.
